CONNECTIONS
===========

CONNECT TO BATTERY PACK(S) (SOLD SEPARATELY)
--------------------------------------------

This product can support up to 5 battery packs to meet the need for large power capacity. For details on how to use it, please refer to the |BATTERY_PACK_NAME| User Manual.

.. image:: templates/word_template/common_assets/overview/front_product.jpg
   :alt: Battery pack connection placeholder.
   :width: 360px

**CAUTION**

- Ensure all products are powered off before connecting the |PRODUCT_SHORT_NAME| to the |BATTERY_PACK_NAME|.
- To ensure proper operation of the product, make sure the air intake and exhaust vents on both sides are unobstructed. Leave at least 200 mm of space between the vents and any objects to allow for proper heat dissipation.

   :widths: 25 25 25 25
